/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmaster_ros2_interface__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libmaster_ros2_interface__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/master_ros2_interface__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/master_ros2_interface/msg/_custom_msg_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/master_ros2_ws/build/master_ros2_interface:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libmaster_ros2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libmaster_ros2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
